guide_response.verdict: **STAGE 5 → STAGE 6 BOUNDARY GATE: APPROVED.** 45-min post-close soak observation (2026-04-30T16:55:26Z → 2026-04-30T17:41:15Z; 45 cycles × 60s) returned CLEAN across every dimension LA specified. Inline MM-scope STATUS.md doc-defect corrections (drift §1 + §2 from 5.12 verdict) committed at `9a23911`. Post-verdict LA-authored commit `777e4a5` added Ticket UU (Vikunja project rationalization) — verdict snapshot at 28 preserved per no-amend doctrine; current STATUS.md backlog count 29. Stage 6 (Hardening, LOW risk, multi-session) authorized to spawn at LA discretion; transitional discussion required for: Guide-#9 retire vs continue, EA-10 spawn timing, 24h soak start time, Vikunja conversion approach for 29-ticket backlog.

work_completed_in_this_cycle.work: STATUS.md 3 edits: - Row 5 table: shortstat 335/+1120/-33179 + cumulative 480/+32942/-37655/42 commits + §8 cross-reference - §7 inherited list: 19→20 + restore LL letter - §8 Stage 5 commit-discipline footnote: full disambiguation block with EA-9 drift annotation Drift §1 + Drift §2 from 5.12 verdict resolved inline per LA approval. Backlog count unchanged (28 at verdict-emission moment).

soak_monitor.ps1 polled every 60s for 45 cycles. Output: soak_log.txt (1275 lines, ~150KB). Observation scope per LA directive: wake_launcher.ps1, agents-cadence-monitor.ps1, escalation_watchdog.ps1, toast_watchdog.ps1, claude.exe spawn surveillance, BlarAI watch path recreation surveillance, fleet pause state monitoring. Result: ZERO fleet-spawned agents over the entire 45-min window; ZERO BlarAI-side path recreations; ZERO task failures.

soak_observation_data.fleet_pause_state: fleet_paused=False stable across all 45 cycles. last_updated_by=ea_code_blarai_helper, last_updated_utc=2026-04-30T15:31:12Z (the Stage 5 close-unpause timestamp from devplatform commit 2637413). NO state.json mutations during soak. Fleet correctly running unpaused.
soak_observation_data.agent_spawn_surveillance:
**wake_launcher-children = 0 across all 45 cycles.** No PowerShell or pwsh process matched the pattern `*wake_launcher*` OR `*agents-cadence*` OR `*escalation_watchdog*` OR `*toast_watchdog*` at any poll. This is the LA-specified primary monitoring concern: "Ensure no agents are firing up when there is no work" — VERIFIED.
claude.exe count distribution: - 44/45 cycles = 2 (LA's two pre-existing claude-code sessions; parents = pwsh.exe VS Code shellIntegration; PIDs 10016 + 24692 stable) - 1/45 cycles (cycle=5 at 17:00:32Z) = 14: TRANSIENT spike fully attributed to LA Claude Desktop application launch — parent chain: explorer.exe → Claude.exe (PID 14880) → 9 child processes (Desktop multi-process renderer/utility/GPU) → 2 claude-code subprocess instances spawned by Desktop's claude-code. NOT a fleet event. Returned to count=2 at cycle=6 (17:01:34Z).
**Verdict on agent surveillance**: Stage 5 close is operationally correct. No fleet-spawned agent activity during 45-min idle window. WORK-GATE → NO-WORK-EXIT path (active_tasks.yaml empty roster) functioning per design.
soak_observation_data.task_fleet_firings:
Within soak window (12:55 → 13:41 local; UTC 16:55 → 17:41), observed: - **Wake-* tasks** (Wake EA Code, Wake SDO, Wake Co-Lead Architect): fired at 13:00, 13:15, 13:30 = **3 firings each** (every-15-min cadence); lastResult=0 every firing - **Sprint Auditor**: fired at 13:00, 13:15, 13:30 = **3 firings**; lastResult=0 - **Escalation Watchdog**: fired at 13:00, 13:15, 13:30 = **3 firings**; lastResult=0 - **Agents Cadence Monitor**: fired at 13:00, 13:05, 13:10, 13:15, 13:20, 13:25, 13:30, 13:35, 13:40 = **9 firings** (every-5-min cadence); lastResult=0 - **Disabled tasks** (Toast Watchdog, Daily Digest, Welcome Back Poll, Dashboard Maintainer, Weekly Summary): NO firings; state remained Disabled throughout (correctly per Phase A 2026-04-29 disposition + Phase A Toast Watchdog disable)
**All 585 task observations across 45 cycles × 13 task slots had lastResult=0** (zero exit-non-zero results). All firing tasks exited cleanly via WORK-GATE → NO-WORK-EXIT path (no active sprint per active_tasks.yaml empty roster).
soak_observation_data.log_file_landings: 16 wake-* role logs landed at devplatform path (`devplatform/tools/scheduled-tasks/logs/`): 4 role logs each at 12:45, 13:00, 13:15, 13:30 firings (4 roles × 4 firings = 16; 12:45 was pre-soak baseline observed in cycle=0; soak-window firings produced 12 role logs). cadence_monitor_20260430.log present and stable at 872 bytes (Phase E n1(c) fix verified — minute<5 entries write devplatform-side; non-minute<5 firings exit silently per script design). **0 logs landed at BlarAI side** (`tools/scheduled-tasks/logs/` path absent throughout all 45 cycles per all_absent confirmation).
soak_observation_data.blarai_watch_path_isolation:
6 BlarAI watch paths checked every cycle: - tools/scheduled-tasks - tools/fleet_observability - tools/autonomy_budget - docs/sprints - docs/active_tasks.yaml - docs/scheduled/wake_templates
**All 6 absent across all 45 cycles. 0 recreations.** Phase E + Phase F path-resolution remediations verified effective; no Phase-C-BUG-1 pattern resurgence.
soak_observation_data.vikunja_api: Vikunja API queried mid-soak (project_summary + task searches): v2.3.0 serving on port 3456; 9 projects responding; project 3 (BlarAI Core Development) holding 43 tasks unmodified through soak.

summary.boundary_gate_criteria:
6 criteria evaluated for Stage 5 → Stage 6 transition:
Fleet operates from devplatform side; BlarAI git work isolated from fleet operation; this LA session's BlarAI commit (`9a23911` MM corrections) did not interact with fleet operation. LA's parallel-session UU commit (`777e4a5`) similarly isolated.
45-min soak: 0 fleet-spawned claude.exe / pwsh.exe processes despite 18 task firings (3 wake-* × 3 firings each + 3 sprint_auditor + 3 escalation_watchdog + 9 cadence_monitor). WORK-GATE → NO-WORK-EXIT path functioning per design.
45 cycles × 6 watch paths = 270 path-existence checks; 270/270 absent. Phase E + Phase F path-resolution remediations effective.
9a23911 commits drift §1 + §2 corrections to STATUS.md. Verdict 5.12 snapshot at 28 tickets preserved per no-amend doctrine.
16 wake-role logs + cadence_monitor log all written devplatform-side; 0 logs BlarAI-side.
585/585 task observations lastResult=0; no exit-non-zero, no fleet_paused exit-4 (fleet was unpaused throughout).

commit.subject: Add Ticket UU to Stage 6.7.5 backlog -- Vikunja project rationalization

post_verdict_la_commits_observed.commit: LA-authored. Adds UU ticket to STATUS.md §7. Backlog count 28 → 29. Section retitled to acknowledge post-close evolution. Verdict 5.12 snapshot at 28 preserved per no-amend doctrine. Reason per commit message: audit `devplatform/projects/registry.yaml` cross-project framing vs operational Vikunja reality (project 5 ADR workflow, projects 6/7 BlarAI-prefixed, projects 1/9/10 zero-task placeholders). Bound at LA architectural discussion post-verdict-emission. Boundary gate accepts this as the first Stage-6-cycle ticket binding (preceding Stage 6 formal spawn).

summary.stage_6_spawn_discussion_open_items:
LA stated "we will discuss spawning stage 6" upon return. Open architectural decisions for that discussion:
Option (a): Guide-#9 continues into Stage 6 (single guide instance for hardening cycle; saves handoff overhead; appropriate given LOW risk + Guide-#9 has full Stage 5 context). Option (b): Guide-#9 retires; Guide-#10 spawned via handoff brief at Stage 5→6 boundary per established Guide-#7→#8→#9 precedent (cleaner narrative break; preserves no-amend doctrine pattern). Recommendation: Option (b) per stage_boundary_recommendation trigger in handoff_protocol; consistent with prior cycles. But Option (a) is reasonable given LOW Stage 6 risk + ongoing Guide-#9 familiarity.
EA-10 (or EA-9 continuation) needed for actual Stage 6 execution. Sub-decisions: - Spawn now vs after 24h soak observation period - Single EA per Stage 6 OR per-item EA spawns (28-ticket backlog might warrant batched approach) Recommendation: 24h soak FIRST (per Master Plan §6.7 + Phase D precedent: "soak before action"), then EA-10 spawn for first batch of Stage 6 items. UU + MM should be early-batch given they impact ongoing Vikunja workflow.
Master Plan §6.7 requires 24h soak observation before Stage 6.4+ items. Three start-anchor options: - (a) Soak started at 5.12 close (2026-04-30T15:31:12Z); 24h ends 2026-05-01T15:31:12Z. Already accumulated ~2h13m. - (b) Soak starts at this 5.13 boundary gate approval (now-ish, ~17:42Z); 24h ends 2026-05-01T17:42Z. - (c) Soak counted from end of MM corrections + 45-min observation (2026-04-30T17:41:15Z); 24h ends 2026-05-01T17:41Z. Recommendation: Option (a) — Stage 5 OPERATIONAL CLOSE timestamp is the natural soak-clock-start; the 45-min observation is sub-set of the 24h. Total remaining ~21h47m.
29-letter backlog vs Vikunja tasks gap (LA raised pre-soak: "I don't see the new tickets in Vikunja"). Options: - (a) Create 7 Stage-5-cycle Vikunja tasks (MM/OO/PP/QQ/RR/SS/TT) — fast (~2 min); +UU (just bound) = 8. - (b) Create all 29 Vikunja tasks — full conversion (~15-30 min); inherited tickets need dispatch-reference lookup - (c) Defer to explicit Stage 6.7.5 task ("Convert N letter-tickets to Vikunja"); itself becomes a ticket UU's binding (Vikunja project rationalization) suggests option (b) might be premature pending project structure decision. Recommendation: (a) for the 8 Guide-#9-cycle + Stage-5-discovered + post-close tickets that have clear scope; defer the 21 inherited until UU's Vikunja project decision settles structure.
Items 6.1-6.3 (CLAUDE.md / copilot-instructions.md / AGENTS.md doctrine split) + 6.6 (commit doctrine splits): DEFERRED per V8 / 6.1.v2. LA already performed substantial SOP work; revisit post-soak. Boundary gate honors this deferral; Stage 6 work proceeds with 6.4 / 6.5 / 6.7 / 6.7.5 / 6.7.v2 / 6.8 / 6.9 first.
Item 6.9 archives `docs/platform_separation/` to `docs/archive/`. Open question: when? - (a) Early in Stage 6 (cleanup ASAP) - (b) Late in Stage 6 (after all 6.7.5 tickets that reference Stage 5 dispatch artifacts) - (c) Optional/never (keep visible as procedure record) Recommendation: Option (b) — 6.7.5 tickets like MM, SS, TT, UU reference Stage 5 dispatch artifacts; archiving prematurely creates dead-link friction.
summary.residual_state_assessment:
0 procedural failures. 0 data-loss risks. 0 untracked-but-unsafe artifacts.
4 Class D doc-defects from Stage 5 close cycle: 2 corrected in 9a23911 (MM scope drifts §1 + §2); 2 still in Ticket MM scope post-correction agenda (06_STAGE5_CLEANUP.xml Item 5.9 task name + Stage 5 init pointer V0 expected text + Stage 5.0.v2 audit verdict ext2 strict-count refinement) — non-blocking.
1 deferred residual: la_merge_approve.ps1:189 dynamic-path pattern → Stage 6.7.5 Ticket II per LA option (b2). Documented + non-blocking.
Untracked artifacts in repo: - `temp_for_responses/5.12-GUIDE_RESPONSE_INSTANCE_9_STAGE5_CLOSE_VERIFIED.xml` (Stage 5 close verdict; LA approved) - `temp_for_responses/5.12-S1_BLARAI_TECHNICAL_VERIFICATION.md` (subagent output) - `temp_for_responses/5.12-S2_DEVPLATFORM_PATHREF_VERIFICATION.md` (subagent output) - `temp_for_responses/5.12-S3_PROCEDURAL_COMPLETENESS_VERIFICATION.md` (subagent output) - `temp_for_responses/5.13-GUIDE_RESPONSE_INSTANCE_9_STAGE5_TO_STAGE6_BOUNDARY_GATE.xml` (this verdict) - `soak_log.txt` (45-cycle observation log; ~150KB; audit-trail evidence for criterion 1-6) - `soak_monitor.ps1` (the monitor script itself; reusable for Stage 6.7 24h soak monitoring with cadence parameterization)

guide_response.required_acknowledgments: NONE. Boundary gate is observational; soak verifies Stage 5 close held without regression.
guide_response.proceed_authorization:
**STAGE 6 SPAWN AUTHORIZED** at LA discretion per Master Plan §6 + 07_STAGE6_HARDENING.xml. Boundary gate criteria 1-6 PASS; soak observation validates Stage 5 close stability over 45-min window.
Recommended LA next steps (in order): 1. Review this verdict + soak_log.txt evidence 2. Decide on the 6 open architectural items above (decision 1-6); minimum-viable path: (b) Guide handoff, (a) Stage 5 close-anchored 24h soak, (a) bind 8 Vikunja tasks for Guide-#9-cycle letters now, defer doctrine split per 6.1.v2 3. Apply commit hygiene: optionally commit untracked artifacts before Stage 6 spawn (5.12-* + 5.13-* + soak_log.txt + soak_monitor.ps1) — if Stage 6 will reference them, they should be tracked 4. Spawn Stage 6 chain (Guide-#10 + EA-10) at chosen timing
Guide-#9 standby for any boundary-gate clarifications and/or handoff brief authoring.
guide_response.iteration_count: Boundary gate approval complete in 1 cycle (45-min soak + inline MM corrections + 5.13 verdict emission).
